title: deadlock transaction hang up when connection is broken
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(f1 INTEGER NOT NULL, f2 VARCHAR(255), f3 TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NOW());
CREATE TABLE t2(f1 INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, f2 DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO t1(f1, f2) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'sample');
INSERT INTO t2(f1, f2) SELECT f1, COUNT(*) FROM t1 GROUP BY f1 HAVING f1 > 0;
key_bug_features: Transactions hold locks after client disconnects unexpectedly
